untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires multi-bar price structure analysis (identifying two valleys at similar levels, confirmation breakout, and avoiding third bottom). This requires pattern recognition logic beyond simple indicator comparisons. Specific requirements like 'two bottoms at approximately same price level', 'price rises after right bottom to confirmation level', and 'avoid third bottom falling below first two' cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicator values and allowed operators. Would need custom pattern detection function or look-back window analysis.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using: higher left volume (volume > hvol_20) and confirmation breakout above pivot support level. Exit condition uses support level (s1) break. However, this does not capture the core pattern logic. A proper implementation would require a dedicated double-bottom pattern recognition function that analyzes swing highs/lows over a 20-50 bar lookback window.
